title: Boris IR build-report.json (v0.2)
description: Machine-readable twin of the `build-report.json` section of docs/contracts/ir-schema.md. The prose contract remains normative. Unlike manifest.json and graph.json, this file is published on content failure too (ok: false, non-empty diagnostics).

ok.description: true iff zero error diagnostics and freeze succeeded.

pageCount.description: Page nodes retained after successful parses.

diagnostics.description: Sorted diagnostics; see docs/contracts/diagnostics.md for the closed code set.

diagnostic.description: Key order: severity, code, message, remediation, sourcePath, line, column, id.

code.description: Stable diagnostic code from the closed set, e.g. EDUPLICATEID.

sourcePath.description: null when the diagnostic is not attributable to one source file.

id.description: Entity id when the diagnostic is attributable to one page.
